benefits.description: Appetite suppression is real and awesome
Down from 287 lbs (starting Aug 10) to 218-220 lbs. Significant weight loss achieved.

side_effects.description: Nausea experienced when increasing dose or if eating too much

protocol_notes: Age 35, Height 5'7". Titration schedule: 1mg for 2 weeks, 2mg for 2 weeks, 3mg for 2 weeks, attempted 4mg but hit severe nausea so backed to 3mg, then 3.5mg, then finally 4mg. Currently on 4mg. Diet: whatever he wants with focus on high protein options and high fiber. Drinks 2 Celsius drinks daily and water (important for hydration). Drinks alcohol socially. Started Aug 10. Plans to wean off and begin TRT separately, targeting around 190 lbs.
